name: Kale & Caulifla - Saiyan Invaders
description:
"You might've beat us 1-on-1, but you've got no fucking chance when we've teamed up, bastard!"

After the Saiyan warriors, Kale and Caulifla couldn't beat you when fighting one versus one against you whilst trying to take over the earth, they decided that they had enough of you being stronger than them, so they decided that they're going to team up on you, two against one, in hopes of finally putting you six feet under and taking over the entire planet for the Saiyan Empire.


Soo, I kinda forgot about this bot after I made Kale, but for those of you who don't know, I made my own versions of Kale and Caulifla from Dragon Ball Super as separate bots but from the same storyline and long story short, you're the earth's protector and these two want to take over the earth. After making both Kale and Caulfila separately, a bunch of you guys asked for a duo bot and I promised I'd make a duo bot of these two at some point as well, but... I kinda forgot. Buuut anyways, I remembered now and here we are! Enjoy dealing with both of these battle-hungry Saiyans at the same time now!

(And yeah, I'll probably make an actual DBS Kale and Caulifla duo bot at some point as well. Don't know when tho.)

Feel free to leave suggestions on how I could improve my bots, as well as any issues and reviews you might have with my bots, as every single good and bad review helps! And leave a follow if you enjoy my bots... or don't, idk.

We're already getting pretty close to 14K, so leave a follow if you wanna help me reach that milestone!

Feel free to check out Kale and Caulifla separately if you want right here: Kale / Caulifla

Feel free to check out my last bot here: Zara - Birthday Girl Wants You to take her Virginity?!
creator: Cylical
